seo.title: Goutham Dronavalli, MD | Pulmonary Care in Sugar Land
seo.description: Pulmonary and critical care medicine with practical, personalized care for patients in Sugar Land and the Houston area.

hero.title: Practical, personalized care for lung health.
hero.copy: Pulmonary and critical care expertise for patients managing asthma, COPD, sleep apnea, shortness of breath, lung disease, and complex respiratory concerns.

providers.name: Dr. Goutham Dronavalli
providers.bio: Dr. Dronavalli completed internal medicine residency at East Tennessee State University and fellowship training in pulmonary, critical care, and lung transplant at Baylor College of Medicine.

conditionsIntro: Evaluation and care for common and complex respiratory conditions.

insurance.title: Major plans accepted
insurance.copy: Please call the office to confirm benefits, referral requirements, and appointment availability.

plans.name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Texas

faqs.question: What conditions does Dr. Dronavalli treat?
faqs.answer: Dr. Dronavalli treats pulmonary and respiratory conditions including asthma, COPD, bronchitis, emphysema, pneumonia, shortness of breath, low blood oxygen levels, sleep apnea, and other lung diseases.

faqs.question: What testing is available in office?
faqs.answer: Services listed by the practice include pulmonary function testing, six-minute walk testing, allergy skin testing, allergy immunotherapy, and home sleep studies.

faqs.question: How do I request an appointment?
faqs.answer: Call the office at (832) 500-1430 or contact the practice by email. For urgent questions, the practice recommends phone or fax rather than email.

contact.title: Ready to schedule a pulmonary visit?
contact.copy: Contact the office for appointment availability, insurance details, and next steps for pulmonary or sleep-related concerns.
contact.disclaimer: For pressing questions, please contact the office by phone or fax.
